headings.usage: All section titles, modal headers, and the 'Current Point' display.

spacing.strategy: Generous padding (p-6, p-8) for desktop readability. Dense (p-3, gap-2) for mobile voting grid to prevent scrolling.

buttons.mobile_action: h-20 text-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-wide shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform

inputs.style: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 rounded-md

status_indicators.active: bg-green-100 text-green-700 border border-green-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
status_indicators.closed: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 border border-slate-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
status_indicators.pending: bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

voting_panel.structure: Header (Sticky) -> Question Card -> 2x2 Action Grid -> Status Footer
voting_panel.rules: No scrolling required on modern phones. Buttons must be touch-friendly.

live_results.structure: Hero (Current Question) -> Main Chart (Bar) -> Participation Stats -> Delegate List (Scrollable)
live_results.visuals: High contrast for projector visibility. Massive font sizes for totals.

admin_dashboard.focus: Data density and quick actions (Open/Close Voting).

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use on the 'Active Voting Point' card to signal urgency and focus.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use on the sticky header for the delegate view (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80).
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Buttons should have a distinct 'press' animation (scale-95). Results bars should animate width on update.

accessibility.contrast: AA Standard minimum. Text on colored buttons must be white or dark slate depending on bg brightness.
accessibility.screen_readers: All charts must have tabular fallback or aria-labels.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for background, keep it clean and flat.
Ensure 'Live' indicators are pulsing or distinct.
Test all layouts on mobile viewport sizes (375px width).

image_strategy.instruction: Use purely typographic and icon-based design. No stock photos to maintain institutional seriousness.

instructions_to_main_agent: 3. Implement the Layouts: 'DelegateLayout' (Mobile focused) and 'AdminLayout' (Desktop sidebar).
4. Create the 'VotingCard' component with the 2x2 grid buttons.
5. Ensure the 'LiveResults' component uses a polling or websocket mechanism (mocked if needed) to animate changes.
6. Prioritize the 'Happy Path': Login -> View Active Point -> Vote -> See Confirmation.
